ext.description: Compare folders by contents, present the files that have differences and display the diffs side by side
ext.description.7: Ignore white spaces at the beginning and ending of a line (similar to 'diff -b')
ext.description.8: Ignore all white space differences (similar to 'diff -w')
ext.description.9: Ignore differences caused by empty lines (similar to 'diff -B')
ext.description.10: If true fileName / FileName / FiLE naMe will consider as same file and will be compared
ext.description.11: Pairs of extensions to to considered the same file (.e.g [index.js, index.ts]). Each extension can appear **only once**
ext.markdownDescription.18: Specifies how the diff view's title look like
ext.enumDescriptions.19: eg. left: local file, right: compared file
ext.enumDescriptions.20: eg. left: compared file, right: local file
ext.markdownDescription.21: Specifies which file will be in the left and the right sides of the diff view
ext.enumDescriptions.22: Presents files and folders in a hierarchical tree structure, allowing for a more organized and nested view
ext.enumDescriptions.23: Displays files and folders in a simple, flat list format
ext.description.25: Show the number of files in each view section
ext.description.26: Use Diff & Merge extension as diff view
ext.description.27: Show a warning message before deleting files
ext.description.28: Show a warning message before taking/replacing files
ext.description.29: List of strings to ignore when comparing file contents. Files that differ only by these strings are treated as identical. Only applies when compareContent is enabled. Note: binary files will be compared normally regardless of this setting. May be slow on large files.
ext.description.30: Rules for parsing specific file patterns with external tools
ext.description.32: Command to execute for parsing files
ext.description.33: Arguments to pass to the command. Use '{file}' as placeholder for the file path
ext.description.36: Environment variables to set for the command (optional)
